task_completion.description: Verify the CMS page is enabled and has the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin 'New Page' or 'Edit Page' screen, the 'Enable Page' toggle should be set to 'Yes' and the 'Page Title' input field should contain 'New Arrivals Showcase'.

task_completion.description: Verify the URL Key is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Search Engine Optimization' section, the 'URL Key' input field should contain 'new-arrivals-showcase'.

task_completion.description: Verify the page content contains the required heading and paragraph.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Content' section's editor (either WYSIWYG or HTML source), there should be an h1 heading reading 'Fresh Finds for the Season' and a paragraph reading 'Explore our latest additions to the collection.'.

task_completion.description: Verify a 'Catalog New Products List' widget is added using the 'New Products Grid Template'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Insert Widget' modal or widget properties showing 'Widget Type' as 'Catalog New Products List' and 'Template' as 'New Products Grid Template'. Alternatively, look for the widget shortcode in the text editor.

task_completion.description: Verify the widget is configured to display 6 products.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Widget Options' modal, the 'Number of Products to Display' field should be set to '6'. Alternatively, the widget shortcode in the text editor should contain 'products_count="6"'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Magento Admin GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the Magento Admin panel in a web browser, not using terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction is with the actual Magento application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show a valid Magento admin URL, not a local file path or a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually saved the CMS page.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a success message like 'You saved the page.' at the top of the CMS Pages grid, or the agent clicking the 'Save' button.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Title: 'New Arrivals Showcase'. Expected URL Key: 'new-arrivals-showcase'. Expected Heading: 'Fresh Finds for the Season'. Expected Paragraph: 'Explore our latest additions to the collection.'. Widget Type: 'Catalog New Products List' (internal class: Magento\Catalog\Block\Product\Widget\NewWidget). Widget Template: 'New Products Grid Template'. Products Count: 6.
